series_metadata.series_description: REQUESTS FOR OUTSIDE AGENCY (EX. HIGHWAY PATROL, AUDITOR, EOD...) TO INVESTIGATE AN EMPLOYEE. INCLUDES REQUEST, REFERRAL, AND ANY ATTACHED DOCUMENTATION INCLUDING PRELIMINARY INVESTIGATION BEFORE THE REFERRAL.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year after compleation of investigation or decision not to investigate then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain 1 years after completion of investigation or decision not to investigate then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
